onboarding.addStudentsTip: Complete data gives best auto-fill results.
onboarding.documentsDesc: Enter Birth Certificate, Passport, SSC/HSC data.
onboarding.documentsTip: Use Scan & Auto-fill for OCR extraction.
onboarding.preDepartureDesc: Track Health, VFS, Visa, Flight after COE.

excel.title: Resume Builder
excel.subtitle: Auto-fill student data in school Excel format
excel.uploadSubtitle: Upload school Excel form → auto cell detect → field mapping
excel.selectSchoolErr: Select a school — resume cannot be created without it
excel.schoolRequired: Resume cannot be created without a school
excel.dropzone: Drag & drop Excel template or click to upload
excel.howItWorksDesc: Write {{name_en}}, {{dob}}, {{passport_number}} etc. in your Excel template where you want student data. The system will detect only {{}} cells on upload.
excel.xlsNotSupported: ⚠️ .xls format not supported — open in Excel and Save As → .xlsx
excel.mappingSubtitle: Select system field for each Excel cell
excel.labelPlaceholder: What's in Excel (e.g. 氏名, Name)
excel.step1Desc: Upload school Excel form (.xlsx). The system will auto-detect all cells and labels.
excel.step2Desc: Select system field for each Excel cell. e.g. 氏名 → name_en, 生年月日 → dob
excel.step3Desc: Select students → download. The system auto-fills data and creates Excel files.
